# Rexin Dynamics

> Rexin Dynamics is an AI and robotics company in Kochi, Kerala, India, working
> with businesses worldwide. We deliver AI automation, website and web app
> development, AI voice agents and WhatsApp automation, and we are building
> indigenous autonomous drones and the agentic AI behind them. Getting closer
> to Physical AI.

We ship AI and software for clients globally and fund a harder mission in
aerial robotics. We invoice in USD, CAD, AED, GBP, EUR and INR.

## Services
- AI automation: agentic workflows that run the busywork with a human in the loop
- Website and web app development: fast, modern sites and product front-ends
- AI voice agents: answer calls, qualify leads and book appointments 24/7
- WhatsApp agents: instant replies, routing and follow-ups
- Aerial robotics: custom drone builds, autonomous flight R&D, workshops and labs

## Company
- Founders: Jerom Tom (CEO), Junaid CK (CTO)
- Backed by: IPTIF, IIT Palakkad (DISHA-EIR Program); Buimerc India Foundation
- Registered: Kodinjiyil, Palakuzha, Muvattupuzha, Ernakulam, Kerala 686662, India
